# Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in viva_math.

## Type of Change

* [ ] feat
* [ ] fix
* [ ] refactor
* [ ] docs
* [ ] test
* [ ] chore

## Checklist

* [ ] `gleam test` passed
* [ ] `gleam format` passed
* [ ] Public APIs include doc comments where appropriate
* [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated when user-facing behavior changed
* [ ] Breaking change reviewed and SemVer impact documented
* [ ] Numerical behavior, tolerances, or edge cases are covered by tests

## Mathematical References

List papers, standards, textbooks, derivations, high-precision references, or
trusted implementations used to validate this change.

## Impact on Consumers

Describe any known impact on downstream consumers:

* viva_emotion:
* viva_tensor:
